name: Estelle's Best Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the dry ingredients together.
2. In a 1-quart bowl, beat the egg and add buttermilk and oil.
3. Pour the wet ingredients over the dry ingredients and whisk gently until just incorporated.
4. Heat a griddle to hot.
5. Pour batter onto the griddle and cook until golden brown on each side.
6. Serve with REAL maple syrup. The amount of milk used depends on the dryness of the flour; adjust as needed.
Note: For extra fluffiness, Dudley Raynor suggests adding a beaten egg white into the batter before baking on the griddle.
